data.title: Global hydrogen fueling station market projected to reach $2.76 billion by 2035, growing at 10.6% CAGR from $1.01 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of August 25, 2025, it is projected that the global Hydrogen Fueling Station Market will experience significant growth, increasing from around USD 1.01 billion in 2025 to an estimated USD 2.76 billion by 2035. This growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.6% throughout the forecast period. This surge in market value is attributed to the adoption of stringent environmental regulations by governments across the globe, driving the demand for hydrogen fueling stations.

data.title: Park Street A/S reported positive equity of DKK 980 million in first half of 2025, with EBVAT at DKK 13.7 million, up from DKK 6.5 million in 2024. Significant expense reductions boosted profitability.
data.description: Park Street A/S released its Interim Financial Report for the 1st half of 2025, showing significant growth in financial performance. The company's EBVAT saw a notable increase, reaching DKK 13.7 million, compared to DKK 6.5 million in the same period in 2024. Despite a decrease in net sales from DKK 82.3 million in the 1st half of 2024 to DKK 73.7 million, Park Street A/S managed to achieve this growth by reducing operating expenses related to properties and controlling overhead and financial costs. The company's equity as of June 30, 2025, stood at DKK 980 million, reflecting a positive financial position. The Profit for the Period for the 1st half of 2025 surged to DKK 17.7 million from DKK 2.9 million in the previous year, showcasing a strong financial performance. The Board of Directors approved the interim report, highlighting the company's controlled expenses and improved financial metrics, with more details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hyperscale Data plans to focus on AI data centers and digital asset accumulation, including retaining all mined Bitcoin. (characters: 121)
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (ticker symbol GPUS on NYSE American) will center its efforts on AI data centers and digital asset accumulation, particularly in retaining all mined Bitcoin. This announcement was made on August 25, 2025, by the diversified holding company based in Las Vegas.

data.title: Shenzhen Wingor Biotechnology receives tens of millions in funding round, progressing in stem-cell and gene therapy programs.
data.description: Shenzhen-based Wingor Biotechnology, a prominent firm specializing in stem-cell and gene therapy, has reported substantial advancements in its latest funding cycle. The company has successfully raised tens of millions in Chinese Yuan (CNY) through this financing round.

data.title: StraighterLine and LineLeader partner to provide career-focused childhood education, part of "Finish Your Degree" initiative.
data.description: StraighterLine, a renowned provider of cost-effective, self-paced online courses, will introduce a range of professional development programs tailored specifically for early childhood educators. These offerings are set to be launched under the "Finish Your Degree" campaign in Arlington, Virginia. The initiative is scheduled to commence on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Emera Inc. appoints Jared Green as new CFO, will join on Dec 15, 2025. Jared was CEO of TriSummit Utilities.
data.description: Emera Inc., traded on TSX/NYSE under the symbol EMA, revealed the selection of a fresh Chief Financial Officer, Jared Green. He is slated to commence duties overseeing Finance, Investor Relations, Treasury, and Commercial Investments around December 15, 2025. Green, a seasoned energy executive, previously held the position of President and CEO at TriSummit Utilities (previously AltaGas Canada, TSX:ACI), managing a regulated natural gas utility and renewable power business.

data.title: Okta (OKTA) to release Q2 results with earnings expected at 85 cents/share and revenue at $711.84 million. Share price up 2.5%.
data.description: Cloud-based company Okta, Inc. (NASDAQ: OKTA) is set to announce its second-quarter financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, Aug. 26. Analysts are predicting earnings to be 85 cents per share, up from 72 cents per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $711.84 million, showing growth from $646 million in the previous year. On Aug. 14, Okta added David Schellhase and Mary Agnes Wilderotter to its board of directors. Following this news, Okta's stock rose by 2.5% to reach $92.05 at the end of trading on Friday. For more details and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Leads Biolabs dosed first patient in Phase II trial of LBL-034, after strong Phase I data. Stock Code: 9887.HK.
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on August 24, 2025, Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. made headlines by revealing that the first patient has received a successful dose in the Phase Ⅱ trial of LBL-034 (GPRC5D/CD3 BsAb). This breakthrough comes on the heels of promising Phase Ⅰ results. Leads Biolabs, listed under Stock Code 9887.HK, is pushing forward with this advancement in the biopharmaceutical field.

data.title: XRP struggles to surpass $3 barrier. Analysts bullish for imminent breakout despite recent resistance.
data.description: Over the last week, the price of XRP has struggled to surpass the significant $3 resistance level, falling short of a decisive breakout. Despite this, the majority of analysts remain optimistic, anticipating a potential breakthrough in the near future.

data.title: The Salvation Army marks 20 years since Hurricane Katrina, honoring survivors and lessons learned. Aug. 29, 2025.
data.description: Commemorating survivors and the enduring impact of one of the United States' most significant tragedies, Alexandria, Virginia, on August 25, 2025 - The Salvation Army is gearing up to honor the 20th anniversary of Hurricane Katrina on August 29. This event marks two decades since the devastating hurricane struck, emphasizing the resilience of individuals affected. The organization is dedicated to continuing its mission of aid and support, shaped by the lessons learned from this catastrophe.
